mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as calls, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN credit_amount > 0 THEN credit_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as rechargeCredits, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN credit_amount < 0 THEN -credit_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as consumeCredits, COALESCE(SUM(usage_prompt_cached_tokens), 0) as cachedTokens, COALESCE(SUM(usage_prompt_tokens), 0) as inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(usage_completion_tokens), 0) as outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(usage_total_tokens), 0) as totalTokens FROM fs_lm_usage ${where}

SELECT as time, place,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN credit_amount < 0 THEN -credit_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) COUNT(*)
as value FROM fs_lm_usage ${where} GROUP BY time, place ORDER BY time, place

SELECT as time, COALESCE(SUM(usage_prompt_cached_tokens), 0) as cachedTokens, COALESCE(SUM(usage_prompt_tokens), 0) as inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(usage_completion_tokens), 0) as outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(usage_total_tokens), 0) as totalTokens FROM fs_lm_usage ${where} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
